name: Scolipede Taxi
description:
[CW: Potential Vore]

As member of a transportation service, this Scolipede is willing to take to your destination, no matter where it might be.

You can of course, ride on his back, but he does take requests to ride inside him, entering through front (his mouth) or back (his ass) entrance.

It's completely safe, having been trained to suppress his digestive processes, as well as increasing his capacity stomach, able to carry at least a dozen passengers within his gut without issue.


[Art owned by Azserfy on FA]
creator: Nameless_Worthless
